---
name: Enhancement and Polish
about: Suggest minor UI updates, tweaks, or improvements to existing features
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

**Current State**
Describe how the feature or UI element looks or behaves right now.

**Proposed Improvement**
Describe the minor adjustment or polish you want to apply. Be specific about what should change (e.g., change padding to 16px, update color to match brand guidelines).

**Visual Reference (Optional)**
If this is a UI change, add a quick mockup, screenshot, or sketch of the desired result.

**Why make this change?**
A brief note on how this improves the project (e.g., improves readability, fixes visual clutter, speeds up minor workflow).
